name: Blueberry Spinach Toss
recipeIngredient: 3 kiwi fruit (1 cup), peeled and cut
1/3 cup Gouda or Edam cheese, julienned
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the dressing ingredients in a tightly covered container and shake well.
2. Mix the dressing with the remaining ingredients until everything is evenly coated.
Yields: 4 servings.
